extra.reason: M0 skeleton complete: bun+TS, engine contract types, no-op reduce/render, lever scaffold, lint-enforced engine-purity boundary proven by boundary.test.ts. Gate green: 8 tests, typecheck, lint.

M1 complete: biome-weighted Perlin terrain, min-spaced POIs, text+CSS-grid render, 3 data-only biomes (D21). All 5 acceptance criteria verified incl. scratch 4th-biome data-only check. Gates green (40 tests, typecheck, lint). Final whole-branch review: ready to merge; minor follow-ups filed as idle-adventure-8eh.

M2 complete: embark (town loadout→expedition, energy from packed food, D22 staging slot), move (one 8-dir step, terrain×transport cost, 5 rejection reasons), energy levers filled, D21 cost-path guardrail structurally enforced + tested. All 5 acceptance criteria verified. M1 follow-ups landed (desert variety, entry-POI exclusion). Final review: ready to merge; findings fixed in 16cba56 (GameEvent union, D23 food-ballast decision). Gates green: 69 tests, typecheck, lint.

All four items resolved: (1) desert terrain variety + (2) entry-POI collision fixed in M2 Task 6 (40143e9); (3) under-fill NOTE added to generateGrid; (4) renderGridHtml divergence noted — plus entry-passability note added in 16cba56.

M3 complete: tool-gated gather (hardness÷quality energy cost, one-shot nodes via D24 cleared list, D23 food-ballast slot accounting), drop frees one carry slot, 12 biome-flavoured materials stamped on POIs at generation (D25, D21-safe). All acceptance criteria verified; final review: ready to merge, zero snapshot churn all milestone. Gates green: 99 tests, typecheck, lint.

M4 complete: deterministic combat (zero RNG) — playerDamage weapon×matrix×hidden-affinity, per-piece mitigation defense÷matrix, resolveCombat attrition with chip floor + auto-potions; fight with pre-fight carry check, soft-fail banks carry via endExpedition (D26); scout spyglass-gated stats + exact forecast with tags withheld; 9 biome-flavoured monsters stamped at generation (snapshot-safe). All 5 acceptance criteria verified. Final review: ready with fixes — all 5 applied in e4d45f1. Gates: 135 tests, typecheck, lint.
M5 complete: craft/pack/return, embark debit+validate (D28), weighted materials (D27), town candidateMaps/newGame; 168 tests green, typecheck+lint clean; loop-cheaper-second-run demonstrator passes

M6 complete: play(seed,actions), phase-split legalActions via speculative reduce (D29), closed RejectionReason union + already-cleared split (D30), JSON CLI; scripted full loop across 2 biomes green (183 tests); drove a live loop via CLI — pack/embark/navigate/gather/return/craft silver-sword
Firm carry squeeze: STACK_CAP 10->5; BACKPACK_SLOTS starter 3/leather 5/large-pack 7. Tests made lever-driven; 184 pass, typecheck+lint green.

Gather-tool tier gate landed: MATERIAL_TIER lever + 'tool-too-weak' RejectionReason; gather rejects when bestToolTier<materialTier. New materials coal(T2)/silver->T2/ironwood(T2)/drake-hide(T2)/mithril(T3) in biome tables; steel-pick(q3)/steel-axe(q3) tools + recipes gated by coal. legalActions filters locked nodes free (D29). 189 pass, typecheck+lint green. Bootstrap verified: iron-pick reachable T1, gates coal->steel->mithril.

Gear tiers: steel/mithril plate (+1/+2 def), studded/enchanted T2 for light/robe; steel-sword/mithril-sword(dmg 4/6), composite-bow/inferno-staff. All recipes gated by T2/T3 materials (implicit gather gate). combat.ts unchanged. Full mithril plate floors tier-3s (intended, now earned); armour type still matters early (proven). 194 pass, gates green.

Consumable/transport/backpack tiers: FOOD_ENERGY (ration 10/trail-ration 20) + POTION_HEAL_BY (potion 10/greater 20) replace the flat levers (defaults kept); embark sums per-food energy, combat quaffs per-potion heal; wagon (÷2) transport; large-pack (7) recipe. All T2 consumables gated by T2 inputs. 198 pass, gates green.

All 4 phases landed: firm carry squeeze; gather-tool tier gate + ore/tool ladder; gear tiers; consumable/transport/backpack tiers. Tech tree gated by one MATERIAL_TIER/tool-quality mechanic (no smelting). 198 pass, typecheck+lint green across the branch. Addresses M7 F1/F2/F4.
Deferred by user 2026-07-05: no armour move-tax for now — armour stays slot-free; rely on the inventory squeeze + the magic boss to keep armour choices honest. Reopen if that proves too slack.

Phase 1 landed: Ancient Wyrm tier-4 boss + curves + deterministic chance-based rollLoot in fightAt (t07); full useful-drops rework — every monster part crafts into gear/food/capstone, dragon↔wyrmbane affinity (peu, combat-consumable recipes deferred to bzd); POI_DENSITY 12→18 + BASE_ENERGY_FLOOR=20 (qrl). Sim-verified the boss gate (mithril needs ≥3 greater-potions, 2=death; wyrmfang farms it). All 203 tests + lint + typecheck green.

Slot-based carry + just-in-time food (D35, supersedes D23). New food.digest: food eaten whole-unit off the front maintaining energy>=heldFoodEnergy; eaten units free their slot mid-run; uneaten food banks back (no dup). Consumables + tools now 1 slot/unit; loot still stacks. Caps rebalanced 3→6, 4/6/8→8/12/16. Greedy sustainability harness re-derived+green (food burns down to open loot slots — gathering + backpack bootstrap verified). 203 tests + lint + typecheck green.

Combat consumables (D36). New Loadout.battleItems + 'battle-item' LoadoutSlot; COMBAT_BUFF lever (elixir-of-power +2dmg, warding-draught +3mit); resolveCombat sums buffs into dmgOut/mitigation and consumes all at fight start; unused bank back. Costs inventory slots (consumableSlots). Added the deferred peu recipes (vampire-ash→elixir, troll-hide→warding). Sim-verified: steel+mithril-sword+3gp LOSES the Wyrm bare but WINS with elixir+warding (fought-up path). 205 tests + lint + typecheck green.
ENERGY_PER_FOOD 10→8, FOOD_ENERGY ration 8/trail-ration 16 (kept ≥8). Sustainability harness re-verified green. 206 tests + lint + typecheck pass.

Carry sources stack (D37): carryCap(equipment) = backpack + TRANSPORT_CARRY (horse 2/mule 4/wagon 6) + PANNIERS_SLOTS (+4, beast-only). New 'panniers' equipment slot + item + recipe; BEAST_TRANSPORTS gate. mule+panniers=hauler. 206 tests + lint + typecheck green.

Web UI updated for pqp/zhn (ju3): inventory grid renders per-UNIT consumables (no stacking) + tools + battle-items as real slots, loot as stacks, worn gear as semi-transparent GHOST boxes (free); used/total counter; carryCap (transport+panniers); live food burn-down frees slots on the map. Verified in-browser: town 6/6 with ghosted weapon + ff7 energy; expedition burned 6/6→4/6 walking, freeing loot slots.
